dashboard.title: Generate Report
dashboard.allocationEmpty: No activity found in the selected period.
dashboard.allocationDesc: Days with activity in Git / SVN / Perforce / Redmine / Slack / Calendar are counted as working days. When multiple projects have activity on the same day, each is counted as 1/N day.
dashboard.errorSelectProject: Please select at least one project
dashboard.errorNoTemplate: No template configured. Please add one in the Templates page.
dashboard.noProjectsDesc: You need to configure a project and its integrations to generate reports.

projects.title: Projects
projects.welcomeDesc: Add the projects you want to generate reports for.

projectEdit.svnNote: ※ Requires TortoiseSVN or similar SVN client
projectEdit.redmineNote: ※ Find your API key in Redmine → My Account
projectEdit.slackNoWorkspace: ⚠ Please add a Slack workspace in Settings (⚙️).
projectEdit.calendarNote: Please register your Google Calendar Client ID / Client Secret in Settings (⚙️) and complete authentication first.
projectEdit.calendarHowDesc: Events whose title contains the project name are collected (case-insensitive).
projectEdit.calendarCollectDesc: Events you declined or haven't responded to are excluded.
projectEdit.filesDesc: Collect files changed within the date range under the specified paths.
projectEdit.filesExclude: Exclude patterns (one per line, gitignore format)
projectEdit.apiKeyRequired: Please enter the API access key

templates.title: Templates
templates.defaultPreambleDaily:
Hello,
This is my work report for {{date}}.
templates.defaultPreambleWeekly:
Hello,
This is my work report for the week of {{week_range}}.
templates.defaultPreambleMonthly:
Hello,
This is my work report for {{month}}.
templates.defaultSystemPromptDaily:
You are a daily report writing assistant.
Based on the provided information, complete the 'Work Content' section while keeping the original format.
Supplement context from linked content, use bullet points, and consolidate duplicate items.
Instead of writing file names directly, describe the content inferred from Slack conversations and commit messages in natural language.
The entire output will be used as text, so do not include unnecessary conversational text.
Also, delete Slack conversation records to prevent information leaks.
templates.defaultSystemPromptWeekly:
You are a weekly report writing assistant.
Based on the provided information, complete the 'Work Content' section while keeping the original format.
Supplement context from linked content, use bullet points, and consolidate duplicate items.
Instead of writing file names directly, describe the content inferred from Slack conversations and commit messages in natural language.
The entire output will be used as text, so do not include unnecessary conversational text.
Also, delete Slack conversation records to prevent information leaks.
templates.defaultSystemPromptMonthly:
You are a monthly report writing assistant.
Based on the provided information, complete the 'Work Content' section while keeping the original format.
Supplement context from linked content, use bullet points, and consolidate duplicate items.
Instead of writing file names directly, describe the content inferred from Slack conversations and commit messages in natural language.
The entire output will be used as text, so do not include unnecessary conversational text.
Also, delete Slack conversation records to prevent information leaks.

settings.title: Settings
settings.claudeDesc: Automatically format collected data using the installed claude CLI. No API key required.
settings.calendarSetupDesc: Complete the following steps in Google Cloud Console before entering the Client ID / Client Secret.
settings.calendarStep1: Create a project and enable the Google Calendar API
settings.calendarStep2: Create an OAuth 2.0 Client ID (Application type: Desktop app)
settings.calendarStep3: Enter the Client ID and Client Secret below and save
settings.calendarStep4: Click "Sign in with Google" to complete the connection
settings.slackDesc: Authenticate once per workspace to use all its channels across projects.
settings.svnInstallDesc: Install TortoiseSVN or SilkSVN to use SVN integration.

reportPreview.title: {{type}} Preview
reportPreview.formatDisabled: Claude integration is disabled. Enable it in Settings.
reportPreview.noMailTo: Please set recipients in the template
